== Notes for [[Item:Q116434|Q116434]] ==

Sancha González

b. circa 1131

Sancha González was born circa 1131. She married Fernando Pérez de Traba, son of conde de Traba Pedro Fróilaz de Traba, before 1154.

Family

Fernando Pérez de Traba b. circa 1100

Child

Teresa Fernández de Traba b. c 1154, d. 7 Feb 1180

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
